name: cerebra
description: Cerebra plugin marketplace — neural engagement analysis (TRIBE v2) + auto-editing. Distributes the cerebra plugin: a bundled TRIBE v2 MCP server plus the cerebra-cut skill.

plugins.name: cerebra
plugins.description: Predict a video's population-average cortical-engagement curve with Meta's TRIBE v2 and auto-cut to the peak-engagement moments. Bundles a TRIBE v2 MCP server (stdio) and the cerebra-cut skill; pairs with the pika plugin for trimming + captions.
